overview: A Bengali-language reseller service portal (RESELPONNO / RESELLER BD) with a green-branded header, promotional banner, social media links, notice board, and a 30-button service grid. All buttons are interactive with placeholder modals, and the app features a 4-tab bottom navigation.
features: Green header with hamburger menu and balance button
Red promotional cashback banner with carousel
Social media links card (Facebook, YouTube, Telegram)
Important notice section with details link
30-button service grid in 5x6 layout - all interactive
Service modals with Bengali placeholder content
